date_signed.description: Date when the consent form is signed.  Automatically set when the record is created
date_signed.title: Date signed

archived.description: Indicates that the consent form has been archived and should not be used
archived.title: Archived

appointment.description: ID of the appointment that the consent form is signed for
appointment.title: Appointment

signature_file.description: File with the signature of the patient
signature_file.title: Signature file

updated_at.description: Date and time when the signature was last updated
updated_at.title: Updated at

patient.description: ID of the patient who signed the consent form
patient.title: Patient

consent_form.description: ID of the consent form that is signed
consent_form.title: Consent form
